text_block_list.text:
One day, after Nice Nature has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Trainer? Do you have a minute?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember when we won that hot spring
vacation coupon? Whatever happened to it?

She's talking about the grand-prize we won
together in a raffle. Technically, she gave it to me
to use, but I've been holding on to it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Really? Then... would it be okay if I use it?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You know, it's kinda sad that I can't go even
though I won the coupon too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I like hot springs, after all. In fact, I love hot
springs! I thought it'd be nice to relax a bit, you
know what I mean?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: So... can I?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wooh—er, great. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: All right, then we should sort out scheduling now.
choice_data_list: So who are you going with?
So who are you going with?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: With you, of course! Hello?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Finally.

After some planning and travel time, we
eventually find ourselves at the hot spring
together.

Nice Nature is acting a bit awkward. It might be
because I initially didn't realize she was inviting
me here.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sooo...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Apparently this hot spring has lots of health
benefits. Why don't we go for a soak real quick?
Soaking in the hot spring...

After getting out of the hot spring, I'm relaxing in
my room, when...
Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's me. Can I come in?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ummm... The water was really nice, wasn't it?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Of course I do! It soothed me down to my core.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
All the pent-up stress in my shoulders and back?
Gone, just like that!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...How about you?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That's good. It's a good thing we came here...
right?
choice_data_list: Yeah. Thank you for inviting me.
Yeah. Thank you for inviting me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Don't say it like that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You could just say you wanted to come here with
me too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You could just say you wanted to come here with
me too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
"Thank you for inviting me" sounds like you don't
really care if we came together or not.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Like... I'm the only one who cares.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I don't knoooow. You're avoiding eye contact.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Whatever. I'm being weirdly clingy right now. I
wouldn't blame you if you think I'm annoyi—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...If you say sooo.
choice_data_list: What should I do to make you believe me?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Trophy.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'd like a floppy trophy.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it's supposed to be reward for hard work,
right? I just thought it'd be nice to have one for a
general job well-done...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So... make one right here, right now. You have a
notepad or some paper, right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Where else?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah? That makes me want to see it even
more!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm always the one showing my vulnerable side.
Don't you think it's a bit unfair?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well then, I'll sit next to you and watch. I hope
you're ready to make a masterpiece.

With the occasional interruption from Nice
Nature, I make her requested trophy and present
it to her. As for the quality... Well, it made her
laugh, so I'll consider it a success.

I sense that Nice Nature and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during our time together.
